title: Onboarding -  Permission for location tracking accepted [Android]
scenario: Location permission granted during onboarding does not persist for FindMyDevice feature on Poly Lens app
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
Accept the License Agreement and Privacy Policy.
Tap "Enable now" on the location tracking prompt.
Tap "Allow" in the Android system permissions pop-up.
expected: Location tracking permission is granted for the Poly Lens app. The user proceeds to further onboarding steps. When accessing the Find My Device menu later, the app should not prompt for location permissions again.
